response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to event-driven systems and AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, distributed systems (GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy via TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: No demonstrated experience leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or building senior technical leadership layers
Lack of visible production experience in fintech, credit risk, or regulated financial infrastructure
No evidence of designing model-agnostic agentic architectures with real-time market data feedback loops
